summary: Tested CSS text visibility fixes on DE'CLIC PRO application. Verified that some dark color fixes are in place but additional sections still need attention to resolve white text on light background issues.

design_issues.issue: White text on light background - zone-recommandation p elements still show rgb(255, 255, 255)
design_issues.location: Results page sections with light backgrounds

design_issues.issue: White text on light background - archeology-section-header h4 elements show rgb(255, 255, 255)
design_issues.location: Skills archeology sections on results page

design_issues.issue: White text on white background in tooltip content

positive_findings.status: ✅ Fixed - zone-value elements show dark text rgb(31, 41, 55)
✅ Fixed - tripartite-description shows gray text rgb(156, 163, 175)

passed_tests: Text color testing for key sections
action_item_for_main_agent: Additional CSS fixes needed: 1) Update .zone-recommandation p to use #1f2937 instead of white text, 2) Update .archeology-section-header h4 to use #1f2937 instead of white text, 3) Update .tooltip-content to use #1f2937 instead of white text. Some fixes are already in place (zone-value, tripartite-description) but coverage is incomplete.
success_percentage: Frontend: 50% - Partial fixes in place, additional work needed
testing_limitations: Could not complete full questionnaire to access results page for comprehensive testing. Testing was performed using CSS analysis and computed style verification. Results page sections were tested indirectly through CSS class analysis.
